onException(MisdesignEvent) - Method in interface be.belegkarnil.game.board.tak.event.MisdesignListener
Invoked when a Strategy has badly designed and an Exception occurs.

Invoked when a game begins.

onGameEnds(GameEvent) - Method in class be.belegkarnil.game.board.tak.gui.LogPanel
 
onInvalidAction(MisdesignEvent) - Method in class be.belegkarnil.game.board.tak.event.MisdesignAdapter
See MisdesignListener.onInvalidAction(be.belegkarnil.game.board.tak.event.MisdesignEvent)
onInvalidAction(MisdesignEvent) - Method in interface be.belegkarnil.game.board.tak.event.MisdesignListener
Invoked when a Strategy try to play at an invalid Point position (out of the board, a busy place, no adjacent place, or no matching color place)
onInvalidPiece(MisdesignEvent) - Method in class be.belegkarnil.game.board.tak.event.MisdesignAdapter
See MisdesignListener.onInvalidPiece(be.belegkarnil.game.board.tak.event.MisdesignEvent)
onInvalidPiece(MisdesignEvent) - Method in interface be.belegkarnil.game.board.tak.event.MisdesignListener
Invoked when a Strategy try to play an invalid Piece (not in the Player'hands).

onRoundEnds(RoundEvent) - Method in class be.belegkarnil.game.board.tak.strategy.RandomStrategy
 
onTimeout(MisdesignEvent) - Method in class be.belegkarnil.game.board.tak.event.MisdesignAdapter

onTimeout(MisdesignEvent) - Method in interface be.belegkarnil.game.board.tak.event.MisdesignListener
Invoked when a Strategy hangs and does not select an Action Within the given time frame.

opponent - Variable in class be.belegkarnil.game.board.tak.event.RoundEvent
is the second/other/opponent {link @Player} when the round will start
opponent - Variable in class be.belegkarnil.game.board.tak.event.TurnEvent
is the second/other/opponent {link @Player} when turn round will start
